news.headline: CarMax named a founding partner for Golden State Valkyries, becoming their official used car retailer.
news.summary: CarMax has been named the official used car retailer for the Golden State Valkyries. This partnership will allow fans and team members of the Golden State Valkyries access to a wide selection of quality used cars. The Golden State Valkyries, a popular sports team, will now have CarMax as their exclusive used car retailer. This collaboration is expected to provide a convenient and trustworthy source for used cars to the team and its supporters. It signifies a significant agreement between the two entities, benefiting both parties. This partnership is likely to enhance the overall experience for Golden State Valkyries fans and members, offering them a reliable option for purchasing pre-owned vehicles. The alliance between CarMax and the Golden State Valkyries brings together two prominent entities to serve the needs of consumers in the used car market, paving the way for future collaborations.

news.headline: Performance Shipping Inc. secures time charter contract with ExxonMobil at US$33,500/day for 7 months, earning US$6.6 million.
news.summary: Performance Shipping Inc., a global shipping company focusing on tanker vessels, has recently secured a time charter contract for the vessel M/T P. Aliki with SeaRiver Maritime LLC, an ExxonMobil Corporation subsidiary. The contract, set to last seven months with the daily rate of US$33,500 plus/minus 15 days at the Charterer's choice, is expected to start in early December. The deal stands to bring in roughly US$6.6 million in total gross revenue for the company.

news.headline: Arcfield to end year with $420K in charitable donations, partners with Susan G. Komen and Boulder Crest Foundation. Awards 20 microgrants.
news.summary: A new microgrant program focused on community giving has been launched by the company in Chantilly, Virginia. The initiative includes corporate partnerships with Susan G. Komen and the Boulder Crest Foundation. On December 3, 2024, Arcfield, a prominent provider of government technology and mission support, made this announcement.

news.headline: Huron acquires AXIA Consulting to enhance supply chain capabilities in industrials, retail, healthcare sectors. #HURN #supplychain
news.summary: A professional services firm, Huron (NASDAQ: HURN), based in Chicago, has successfully acquired AXIA Consulting, a prominent provider of consulting and technology solutions specializing in supply chain services. The acquisition strengthens Huron's supply chain services, particularly in sectors such as industrials, manufacturing, retail, and healthcare. This move further enriches Huron's Oracle supply chain management offerings and diversifies its technology portfolio by incorporating advanced Microsoft capabilities.

news.headline: South Korea's stock market will operate on Wednesday as usual - Money Today
BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF now holds over 500K BTC valued at $48B, making up 2.38% of total Bitcoin holdings.
news.summary: The latest filing from BlackRock's IBIT indicates they now possess 2.38% of the total Bitcoin supply, holding 500,380 BTC in their books.

news.headline: Acer launches new Nitro Intel Arc B570 OC 10 GB and B580 OC 12 GB graphics cards for high-performance gaming.
news.summary: Introducing the latest graphics cards, the Nitro Intel® Arc™ B570 OC 10 GB and Nitro Intel Arc B580 OC 12 GB. These cards are crafted for top-tier gaming, content creation, and AI-driven activities. They boast the advanced Xe2 architecture with a maximum of 20 cores and impressive clock speeds reaching up to 2,740 MHz.

news.headline: Founder Jennifer A. Beckage from The Beckage Firm represents U.S. at global AI conference in Paris.
news.summary: In December 3, 2024, The Beckage Firm shared the accomplishment of their Founder and Managing Director, Jennifer A. Beckage, Esq., CIPP/US, CIPP/E, as she served as a keynote speaker representing the United States at the prestigious Generative Artificial Intelligence for Lawyers event. This event gathered ##(specific number)## legal professionals and technology experts to discuss the implications of artificial intelligence in the legal field.

news.headline: NF Audio rebrands to NF Acous after 10 years, founded in 2014 by Felix Yang in China. New era of consumer acoustics.
news.summary: NF Audio, established by Felix Yang in 2014, is ushering in a new era in consumer acoustics. The company has officially rebranded as NF ACOUS in commemoration of its ten-year anniversary. Previously known for its expertise in In-Ear Monitors (IEM) in China, NF ACOUS has built a strong reputation over the past decade.

news.headline: Hexagon Digital Wave debuts MAE system for Type 3 gas trailers in Colorado on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: A premier supplier in the compressed gas distribution sector, Hexagon Digital Wave, has introduced a new service for in-situ requalification of Type 3 gas distribution trailers. This cutting-edge offering utilizes their exclusive Modal Acoustic Emission (MAE) technology. This advancement in requalification services is a significant step forward for industries reliant on gas distribution trailers for various operations.

news.headline: StreamUnlimited updates hardware modules for longevity and seamless integration with StreamSDK, prioritizing extended support and future-proof flexibility.
news.summary: Vienna, on December 3, 2024 - StreamUnlimited, a prominent player in connected audio and IoT solutions, has announced a notable advancement. They have redesigned their hardware modules to offer extended durability and enhance compatibility with StreamSDK. This upgrade guarantees that the modules will stay in sync with evolving technologies in the long run.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile and Cadence team up for AST5000 ASIC, leveraging Cadence tools for global cellular network.
news.summary: In a joint effort, Cadence and AST SpaceMobile have partnered to develop the AST5000 ASIC, a specialized, energy-efficient design. This collaboration merges AST SpaceMobile’s innovative approach with Cadence’s cutting-edge tools, workflows, and intellectual property. The AST5000 ASIC represents a breakthrough in custom technology, combining advanced features with low power consumption. This collaboration highlights the expertise of both companies in creating high-performance solutions.

news.headline: Bollinger Motors gets order for 7 B4 trucks from TEC Equipment with full payment on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: Bollinger Motors completed the full payment for all seven Bollinger B4 trucks via electronic transfer on December 2, 2024, resulting in immediate recognition of revenue for the company.

news.headline: HealthEquity unveils benefits trends for 2025 at SHRM event. Focus on cost transparency and containment to combat rising costs affecting employee satisfaction and benefits utilization.
news.summary: An upcoming event organized by SHRM will address strategies and key points for employers to tackle increasing costs impacting employee satisfaction and benefits utilization. The event aims to provide essential tools and insights for employers facing challenges from escalating costs.

news.headline: CEA Industries Inc. in talks to buy specialty retailer with mix of cash, shares, and debt. #acquisition #CEAD #CEADW #retail
news.summary: In Louisville, Colorado on December 3, 2024, CEA Industries Inc. (NASDAQ: CEAD, CEADW) disclosed its plan to acquire a prominent specialty retailer and manufacturer known as the “Target.” The acquisition is outlined in a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) and is proposed to be funded through cash, CEA Industries common shares, and debt. This strategic move signifies CEA Industries’ endeavor to expand its portfolio and enhance its market presence.

news.headline: Smilegate invests in Dan Houser's Absurd Ventures to boost global gaming reach, creating new growth opportunities.
news.summary: Smilegate, with its strong knowledge of Asian markets, alongside Dan Houser and the Absurd Ventures team's rich experience in creating blockbuster AAA games, intends to generate extensive and lasting business prospects on a global scale. The announcement was made in Santa Monica, California on December 3, 2024, showcasing the potential for growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Shanna Lord named Executive Director of Watercrest Macon Assisted Living and Memory Care in Macon, GA.
news.summary: Watercrest Senior Living Group is pleased to appoint Shanna Lord as the Executive Director of Watercrest Macon Assisted Living and Memory Care Community in Macon, Georgia. This award-winning community welcomes Lord, a seasoned executive, to lead the facility.

news.headline: Instacart's CFO Emily Reuter to join fireside chat at Nasdaq London Investor Conference on Dec 10, 2024, 9:00 a.m. GMT.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 3, 2024, Instacart (NASDAQ: CART) revealed that CFO Emily Reuter is set to engage in a fireside discussion during the Nasdaq 51st London Investor Conference on December 10, 2024, starting at 9:00 a.m. GMT. The event will provide an audio webcast for viewers.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs cautions Trump's 25% tariff on NAFTA could lead to 4% GDP shrink for Canada, Mexico, and 0.4% for U.S.
news.summary: President-elect Donald Trump's proposed 25% tariff on imports from Canada and Mexico may have severe economic consequences. Goldman Sachs predicts that Canada and Mexico could see their GDP shrink by as much as 4% under the tariff, with the U.S. GDP possibly contracting by 0.4%. Every 10% increase in tariffs could reduce Canada's GDP by 1.5% and Mexico's by 2%. With a full 25% tariff, these figures could rise to over 2.5% for Canada and 3.5% for Mexico. The economists also warn of surging consumer prices and a slowdown in U.S. growth due to the proposed tariffs.

news.headline: Intel plans to compensate former CEO Gelsinger with a potential payout of $10 million.

Bitwise unveils momentum-based "Trendwise" strategies in 3 crypto futures ETFs, moving between crypto & treasuries based on price trends to enhance risk-adjusted returns. Investors can access through Bit.
news.summary: Bitwise Asset Management, a crypto specialist based in San Francisco, has disclosed the transformation of three crypto futures ETFs from long-only tactics to techniques that alternate between cryptocurrencies and U.S. Treasuries. The decision comes as a response to price trends in the crypto market. The exclusive momentum-driven strategies aim to assist investors seeking Bitcoin or Ethereum exposure in enhancing their risk-adjusted returns by effectively handling downside risk. Interested investors can now tap into the Trendwise strategies through Bitwise.

news.headline: Backblaze partners with Philadelphia Eagles to showcase media production speed and security; will present case study at Sports Video Group Summit.
news.summary: Based in San Mateo, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) is known for its innovative cloud storage services as an alternative to conventional providers. It recently revealed plans to showcase a groundbreaking media production case study alongside the Philadelphia Eagles at the Sports Video Group (SVG) Summit Cloud Production Workshop in New York City on Dec. 16. The session, titled “Protecting QBs and PBs: Moving from tape to cloud for real-time production access and resiliency,” will highlight the transition to cloud storage for improved efficiency and accessibility.

news.headline: First Fidelity Bank chooses Cotribute to improve commercial account opening process in Anaheim, Calif.
news.summary: A major bank based in Anaheim, California, has chosen Cotribute's Consumer Account Opening module to streamline the process of opening accounts for Health Savings Accounts (HSAs). This decision aims to simplify and enhance the experience for customers applying for HSAs with a focus on improving efficiency.

news.headline: Pregnancy Help 4 U relocates to 5407 Basswood Blvd, Fort Worth, TX. Launches donation challenge.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on December 3, 2024, Pregnancy Help 4 U (PH4U) revealed its relocation to a more spacious and conveniently situated facility at 5407 Basswood Blvd, Fort Worth, TX. This transition signifies a significant advancement in the organization's goal to support women and families in challenging situations.

news.headline: Infotech in Gainesville, Florida, appoints new CRO and COO to drive growth with Go-to-Market strategies.
news.summary: A recent announcement from Gainesville, Florida reveals that Infotech has named a new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) and Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead efforts in driving Go-to-Market strategies and overall business initiatives. The appointments aim to enhance execution processes and reach growth targets more effectively.

news.headline: Spotify showcases Cey Adams' 40-year art career at The Art of Hip Hop during Miami Art Week. Celebrating the artist's journey and accomplishments.
news.summary: An event in Miami on December 3, 2024, will highlight the career of Cey Adams, known for being the Founding Creative Director at DEF JAM Recordings. The retrospective exhibition, titled Departure: 40 Years of Art and Design, is being hosted by Art of Hip Hop. This event will celebrate Adams' contributions to the art world and showcase his work over the span of 40 years. The exhibition aims to honor the contemporary artist and his significant impact on the industry.

news.headline: FCC grants Globalstar 15-year renewal for mobile earth terminal authorization with US and French-licensed NGSO satellites.
news.summary: Globalstar, Inc. disclosed that the FCC granted GUSA Licensee LLC a 15-year renewal for its operation of various mobile earth terminals with U.S. and French-licensed NGSO satellites in the United States. Globalstar, a leading mobile satellite and communications services provider, obtained this authorization from the FCC. The renewal signifies a substantial extension in their authority to operate with their NGSO satellites in both countries. This development was unveiled by Globalstar, listed on the NYSE American as GSAT.

news.headline: Ventas (NYSE: VTR) announces Brookdale Senior Living did not extend Master Lease term from January 1, 2026.
news.summary: In Chicago, Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) revealed that Brookdale Senior Living did not opt to extend the Master Lease agreement with Ventas, expiring on January 1, 2026. This decision means Brookdale forfeits the option to prolong the lease for any assets under the Master Lease. Ventas plans to utilize its Ventas OITM platform and playbook for the transition.

news.headline: Watches of Switzerland Group partners with Zillion to provide instant insurance at point of sale for watch and jewelry purchases.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Watches of Switzerland Group and embedded insurance provider Zillion in Boston. The collaboration aims to enhance client experiences by offering instant coverage for watch and jewelry purchases through a simple one-click process on mobile devices. Clients no longer need applications, appraisals, or downloads to access this benefit. This seamless service upgrade is designed to provide an elevated experience for customers. The collaboration promises to transform the way clients interact with their purchases and consolidates the commitment to delivering exceptional service.

news.headline: Chainlink's price jumps 15% in one day to $24 with $15.05 billion market cap. Trader sentiment grows, seeing undervaluation.
news.summary: The notable surge in Chainlink's (CRYPTO: LINK) value is being supported by robust fundamentals, a significant strategic partnership, and a growing positive sentiment amongst traders who perceive the altcoin as undervalued. The latest cryptocurrency figures exhibit LINK priced at $24.00 with a market capitalization of $15.05 billion, marking a 14.5% increase in the last 24 hours and a 42.8% jump over the past week. Conversely, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) stands at $2.61 with a market cap of $148.7 billion, showing a 7.4% rise in the last 24 hours and an impressive 91.9% surge in the past week. Stellar (CRYPTO: XLM) is priced at $0.523 with a market cap of $15.7 billion, showcasing a negligible -0.01% fluctuation in the last 24 hours but an 18.3% increase over the week. WeRate co-founder Quinten Francois highlighted LINK's high illiquidity, driven by long-term holders holding out for prices above $100, which could result in a supply crunch due to resilient sellers and adamant believers, potentially triggering rapid price escalations akin to previous XRP and XLM rallies. For more details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Rasmussen University in Minneapolis celebrates year-round commitment to community service through volunteer hours and service initiatives.
news.summary: Rasmussen University in Minneapolis is proud to provide significant support through volunteer efforts and university-wide service initiatives. On December 3, 2024, in honor of Giving Tuesday, the university highlights its dedication to making a positive impact. Through countless volunteer hours and community service projects, Rasmussen University continues to contribute meaningfully.

news.headline: Urbint acquires Competers, expanding damage prevention presence, serving 100+ customers in North America.
news.summary: In Miami on December 3, 2024, Urbint, a prominent AI platform specialized in detecting and reducing risks to workers, critical infrastructure, and communities, revealed its acquisition of Competers. The former serves over 100 clients, encompassing industries such as utilities, telecommunications, and contract locate companies.

news.headline: Macnica Americas partners with Sony to distribute image sensors for various industries in North America.
news.summary: Macnica Americas, based in Solana Beach, California, has revealed on December 3, 2024, the extension of its partnership with Sony to distribute advanced image sensors in North America. This collaboration aims to introduce next-generation imaging solutions in fields such as artificial intelligence, robotics, and healthcare. This expansion highlights the commitment to providing innovative technology to a wide range of industries.

news.headline: Zynex joins Open Oximetry Project, a medical technology company specializing in noninvasive medical devices, as of Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Englewood, Colorado on December 3, 2024, Zynex, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZYXI), a pioneering medical technology firm known for producing and distributing noninvasive medical equipment for pain relief, recovery, and patient supervision, announced their latest developments.

news.headline: Beneficient will present at the Emerging Growth Conference on Dec 4, 2024 with a webcast group presentation.
news.summary: Beneficient has received an invitation to participate in the Emerging Growth Conference scheduled for Wednesday, December 4, 2024. During the event, the Company will conduct a webcast group presentation for potential investors and interested parties.

news.headline: Hapbee introduces a new Smart Sleep Pad to tackle the global sleep crisis, providing personalized solutions to improve health.
news.summary: Hapbee Technologies, Inc. has introduced a new digital wellness solution aimed at addressing the worldwide sleep crisis. The company, a pioneer in this field, launched the Smart Sleep Pad along with a Sleep Membership package in response to growing concerns over the significance of quality sleep for general well-being. By offering a personalized and adaptable product, Hapbee aims to provide a practical and non-invasive remedy for various sleep issues. The Smart Sleep Pad serves as the company's primary digital wellness offering, emphasizing accessibility and effectiveness. This initiative is backed by positive customer input and an increasing body of research underlining the profound influence of sleep on holistic health. Hapbee has disclosed this development without specifying the source.

news.headline: BioAdaptives, Inc. approved a one-for-one stock dividend for common stockholders owning shares on the Record Date.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Las Vegas, it was announced that BioAdaptives Inc. (OTC: BDPT) has approved a dividend for all common stockholders. The dividend will consist of matching shares corresponding to the number of shares owned by each stockholder on the designated Record Date.

news.headline: Winners of VicOne and Block Harbor Capture the Flag Competition, Robbe Derks and Greg Hogan honored at Auto-ISAC Cybersecurity Summit in Detroit.
news.summary: VicOne and Block Harbor revealed the winners of the 2024 Automotive Capture the Flag (CTF) competition as Robbe Derks from Belgium and Greg Hogan from the United States. The announcement was made during an awards ceremony on October 23 at the Auto-ISAC Cybersecurity Summit in Detroit. VicOne, a leader in automotive cybersecurity solutions, is based in Detroit, while Block Harbor, a respected automotive cybersecurity engineering firm, is located in Tokyo. The competition showcased talents in cybersecurity, with participants from various countries competing. The event attracted significant attention within the industry, with representatives from leading automotive companies in attendance.

news.headline: SkinCeuticals unveils exclusive holiday kits in 2024, offering advanced skincare solutions. #1 Medical Aesthetic Skincare Brand.
news.summary: SkinCeuticals is introducing a range of holiday gifts as the year wraps up, catered for gifting, self-care, and enhancing skincare routines with advanced solutions. In New York on December 3rd, 2024, SkinCeuticals, renowned as the top Medical Aesthetic Skincare Brand, is marking the festive season.

news.headline: Think Bold Festival 2025 in Jacksonville on April 11-12 promotes innovation and entrepreneurship. #ThinkBoldFestival
news.summary: A prominent organization, Think Bold, known for championing innovation and entrepreneurship, is excited to unveil the upcoming Think Bold Festival & Conference. The event is set to take place on April 11-12, 2025, at the prestigious Hyatt Regency Jacksonville in Florida.

news.headline: Dutchie dispensaries saw significant sales on Green Wednesday, with millions of transactions processed on November 27, 2024. 6,500 legal cannabis dispensaries were supported.
news.summary: On November 27, 2024, Dutchie, a top technology platform in the cannabis industry, facilitated millions of transactions for dispensaries on their platform. This day, referred to as Green Wednesday, is renowned as the second most significant sales day annually for the industry, standing just behind 4/20. Dutchie extended its services to more than 6,500 authorized cannabis dispensaries, enabling consumers to easily buy products.

news.headline: Babybel® hosts Holiday Village in 6 cities to offer gift wrapping as adults enjoy Babybel cheese; event in Chicago on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: The Babybelves Holiday Village is set to make a stop in six cities across the country offering assistance to busy individuals by providing gift wrapping services while they enjoy Babybel cheese. Taking place in Chicago on December 3, 2024, the event is part of the holiday season initiative by Babybel. The brand aims to engage with its consumers by combining the joy of unwrapping Babybel cheese with the convenience of having presents wrapped. This year's program will engage participants in various cities nationwide.

news.headline: BofA celebrates 20 years of Neighborhood Builders program, training 4,000 leaders at 2,000 US non-profits since 2004.
news.summary: Bank of America's philanthropic program has provided training for over 4,000 leaders from nearly 2,000 US nonprofits since 2004. The program, known as Neighborhood Builders®, is now marking its 20th anniversary. This initiative is recognized as one of the largest and most enduring programs of its kind in the United States.

news.headline: Leaf Home™ appoints Rocco Mango as CEO and Rex Tibbens as Chairman of the Board. Effective from Dec. 3, 2024.
news.summary: In Hudson, Ohio, on December 3, 2024, Leaf Home™, a prominent direct-to-consumer provider of home improvement products, revealed that Rocco Mango has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer by the company's Board. Mango, a seasoned executive, brings valuable expertise to the role.

news.headline: BigID introduces Data Activity Monitoring to enhance data security, the first DSPM provider to offer near real-time monitoring.- Date: Dec 3, 2024- Company: BigID- Key feature: Data Activity Monitoring- Focus: Data security, privacy, compliance, AI data management.
news.summary: Leading data security, privacy, compliance, and AI data management company BigID unveiled their latest offering, Data Activity Monitoring, on December 3, 2024. In a first for the industry, this service provides near real-time monitoring capabilities. BigID is recognized as the sole provider of Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) to introduce such a feature.

news.headline: Meals on Wheels launches pilot program with Caesars Foundation, reducing senior disconnectedness with friendly calls and visits.
news.summary: A new pilot program, made possible by the Caesars Foundation, has been initiated to show the effectiveness of friendly calling and visiting in lessening isolation among senior citizens. Starting in Arlington, Virginia, on December 3, 2024, this program is backed by Meals on Wheels America, the prominent group aiding over [insert number] seniors nationwide. The initiative aims to tackle the growing issue of disconnectedness among the elderly by providing social interaction and support.

news.headline: RVshare predicts travel behavior in 2025 will focus on quality experiences and passion-driven trips.
news.summary: RVshare predicts that by 2025, travel trends will focus more on enjoying experiences rather than checking off items on a list. The forecast, originating from AUSTIN, Texas and AKRON, Ohio on Dec. 3, 2024, suggests that travelers will be driven by their interests and hobbies, conscious spending habits, and a strong preference for top-notch experiences.

news.headline: St. Charles Consulting Group releases audiobook "The Talent-Fueled Enterprise" on Dec. 3, 2024. Leader in strategic consulting for Fortune 1000 organizations.
news.summary: In St. Charles, Illinois, on December 3, 2024, the St. Charles Consulting Group, a prominent strategic consulting firm for Fortune 1000 companies, revealed the launch of the audiobook version of the highly praised book "The Talent-Fueled Enterprise, A Powerful Approach to Build Tomorrow's Workforce." This book has garnered significant recognition and is aimed at assisting organizations in shaping a robust workforce for the future.

news.headline: Alan AI launches Agent-Generated Dynamic UI for Enterprise AI interactions. Introduces interactive workflow solution in Sunnyvale, Calif on Dec 3, 2024.
news.summary: Alan AI has launched a new AI-driven workflow solution that includes interactive graphs, charts, and forms, aimed at enhancing the user experience for enterprises. The technology was introduced on December 3, 2024, in Sunnyvale, California. Alan AI, known for its AI-driven enterprise solutions, has developed this innovative platform to revolutionize the way businesses operate. With this new advancement, companies can expect to experience a significant boost in productivity and efficiency.

news.headline: Oshi Health included in CB Insights 2024 Digital Health 50 list for innovative GI care, offers immediate access to experts.
news.summary: Oshi Health has recently secured a position for its cutting-edge hybrid care approach, offering patients prompt access to top-tier multidisciplinary digestive health specialists. The company, based in New York, announced this achievement on December 3, 2024. As the leading virtual gastrointestinal (GI) Center of Excellence in the country, Oshi Health stands out for its innovative model.
